args.query: SELECT "Index" as idx, MIN(Date) as min_date, MAX(Date) as max_date, COUNT(*) as n FROM index_trade GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index" as idx, MIN(Date) as min_date, MAX(Date) as max_date, COUNT(*) as n FROM index_trade GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

result.preview: "Cannot compute \u201csince 2020\u201d intraday volatility for Asia indices with the provided data: the index_trade table only runs up to 2020-09-30 (or earlier) for Asia indices (HSI ends 2019-09-30; 000001.SS ends 2015-09-30; 399001.SZ ends 2015-09-30; NSEI ends 2014-09-30; N225/TWII end 2020-09-30). Please provide data from 2020 onward (or confirm you mean \u201cin 2020 up to 2020-09-30\u201d)."
